'''wasate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:multifariously|multifariously]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-s-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:multifariously|multifariously]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| wasate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:wasate|wasate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:wasatesher|wasatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wasatesherĂ«m|wasatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:wasatero|wasatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:wasateshĂ«|wasateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wasateshĂ«m|wasateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiwasatero|gokiwasatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokiwasateshĂ«|gokiwasateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiwasateshĂ«m|gokiwasateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gowasankerom|gowasankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gowasankeshĂ«|gowasankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowasankeshĂ«m|gowasankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gowasankeya|gowasankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:wasaterom|wasaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wasatemu|wasatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:wasateya|wasateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiwasaterom|gokiwasaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiwasatemu|gokiwasatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokiwasateya|gokiwasateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:wasasate|wasasate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:wasasatesher|wasasatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wasasatesherĂ«m|wasasatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:wasasatero|wasasatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:wasasateshĂ«|wasasateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wasasateshĂ«m|wasasateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiwasasatero|gokiwasasatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokiwasasateshĂ«|gokiwasasateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiwasasateshĂ«m|gokiwasasateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gowasasankerom|gowasasankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gowasasankeshĂ«|gowasasankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowasasankeshĂ«m|gowasasankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gowasasankeya|gowasasankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:wasasaterom|wasasaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wasasatemu|wasasatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:wasasateya|wasasateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiwasasaterom|gokiwasasaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiwasasatemu|gokiwasasatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokiwasasateya|gokiwasasateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:wĂŠsĂŠte|wĂŠsĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:wĂŠsĂŠtesher|wĂŠsĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wĂŠsĂŠtesherĂ«m|wĂŠsĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:wĂŠsĂŠtero|wĂŠsĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:wĂŠsĂŠteshĂ«|wĂŠsĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wĂŠsĂŠteshĂ«m|wĂŠsĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiwĂŠsĂŠtero|gokiwĂŠsĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokiwĂŠsĂŠteshĂ«|gokiwĂŠsĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiwĂŠsĂŠteshĂ«m|gokiwĂŠsĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gowĂŠsĂŠnkerom|gowĂŠsĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gowĂŠsĂŠnkeshĂ«|gowĂŠsĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowĂŠsĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gowĂŠsĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gowĂŠsĂŠnkeya|gowĂŠsĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:wĂŠsĂŠterom|wĂŠsĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wĂŠsĂŠtemu|wĂŠsĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:wĂŠsĂŠteya|wĂŠsĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiwĂŠsĂŠterom|gokiwĂŠsĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiwĂŠsĂŠtemu|gokiwĂŠsĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokiwĂŠsĂŠteya|gokiwĂŠsĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:wafsafte|wafsafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:wafsaftesher|wafsaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wafsaftesherĂ«m|wafsaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:wafsaftero|wafsaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:wafsafteshĂ«|wafsafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wafsafteshĂ«m|wafsafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiwafsaftero|gokiwafsaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokiwafsafteshĂ«|gokiwafsafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiwafsafteshĂ«m|gokiwafsafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gowafsafnkerom|gowafsafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gowafsafnkeshĂ«|gowafsafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowafsafnkeshĂ«m|gowafsafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gowafsafnkeya|gowafsafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:wafsafterom|wafsafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wafsaftemu|wafsaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:wafsafteya|wafsafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiwafsafterom|gokiwafsafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiwafsaftemu|gokiwafsaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokiwafsafteya|gokiwafsafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]
